title: Very Large Screenshots
description: Enables you to take huge screenshots in minecraft for better image quality and detail
body:
![Title image that states: Very large high quality screenshots](https://github.com/n8-M4x/Very-Large-Screenshots/blob/b4ccc866918333a81cd0bbd43b3255642d511ff8/vls_title.png?raw=true)

**Fabric mod for taking high quality screenshots with large resolutions to customize.**

**Keep in mind that very large resolutions will take extra long to save and may crash or lag your game.**

![Example of image quality](https://github.com/n8-M4x/Very-Large-Screenshots/blob/282601df0b685cfb5e3a6d36f9cfc2504f1e227c/vls_example.png?raw=true)

**There are three Keybinds: One for Screenshotting, and Two for adjusting the scale factor by +/- 0.1**

![Keybinds Screen with the three keybinds](https://github.com/n8-M4x/Very-Large-Screenshots/blob/04e0fa93570f331d33d7dd7550628c2a766cc8c6/keybinds.png?raw=true)
